query:
UPDATE flight_tickets ft
JOIN registrations r ON ft.registrationId = r.id
SET ft.passportNumber = JSON_UNQUOTE(JSON_EXTRACT(r.passportOcrData, '$.passportNo'))
WHERE ft.registrationId >= 630000 AND r.passportOcrData IS NOT NULL;
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway04.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user ZhmXq2fuwbq2e6E.b3f96895581d --database 9L2UFkGMTFNGvGrFPN8jYv --execute UPDATE flight_tickets ft
JOIN registrations r ON ft.registrationId = r.id
SET ft.passportNumber = JSON_UNQUOTE(JSON_EXTRACT(r.passportOcrData, '$.passportNo'))
WHERE ft.registrationId >= 630000 AND r.passportOcrData IS NOT NULL;
